title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
